name: Agent Fleet
description: A managed fleet of LangGraph agents, operated the way AgeniusDesk operates n8n instances: a catalog, run + live (polled) graph view, human-in-the-loop approve/resume, and LangSmith tracing. Ships ops-triage (ReAct), fix-proposer (HITL), and health-reporter (parallel fan-out). Runs in_process and needs the langgraph extra installed in the AgeniusDesk environment plus an Anthropic API key.
author: Agenius AI Labs

secrets_required.description: Anthropic API key the agents run on. The AgeniusDesk assistant may already hold it; if so this is not needed again.
Optional. Set with LANGSMITH_TRACING=true to trace runs in LangSmith.
Optional. Only used by a future cross-provider reviewer agent.
